'''Darvon Jewett''' was the [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of the [[Boeus sector/Legends|Boeus sector]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] withdrew from the [[Sector/Legends|sector]],<ref name="J2" /> retreating to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|161|Jewett, Darvon}}</ref> Jewett turned to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for support, and managed to retain the services of several [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] when their crew mutinied on learning about Palpatine's demise. Jewett managed to keep trade and communications lines open between the [[Star system/Legends|star systems]] in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]], maintaining services and economical ties.<ref name="J2" /> Jewett's support helped the New Republic to spread its influence throughout the Expansion Region.<ref name="RPG2" />
